_VerifiedCollectionSchema.description: Output schema used by legacy ToolExecutor.dispatch validation.
_VerifiedCollectionSchema.title: _VerifiedCollectionSchema

description: Input for TAGO bus arrival search.

city_code.description: Official TAGO cityCode from the provider getCtyCodeList contract. Common metropolitan examples: Busan=21, Daegu=22, Incheon=23, Gwangju=24, Daejeon=25, Ulsan=26.
city_code.title: City Code

node_id.description: Official TAGO nodeId returned by tago_bus_station_search.
node_id.title: Node Id

route_id.description: Optional client-side filter against the official TAGO response field routeid. Get it from tago_bus_route_search when route_no alone is ambiguous.
route_id.title: Route Id

route_no.description: Optional client-side filter against the official TAGO response field routeno. It is not sent upstream; use it when the citizen names a visible bus route such as 1001.
route_no.title: Route No

title: tago_bus_arrival_search
